languages.text: "Только из рассказов прошлых Призывов. Люди там — имущество, мелкие просчеты — повод для заточения в тюрьме. Вот уж из таких-то бедолаг наш полк когда-то и сделали. Богом-Императором забытое и проклятое местечко, словом".

"Only from the stories of the old Call-Ups. People there are nothing but property. And minor mistakes are grounds for imprisonment. Our regiment was once formed from such unfortunate souls. In short, it's a cursed place abandoned by the God-Emperor."
languages.original_text: "Только из рассказов прошлых Призывов. Люди там — имущество, мелкие просчеты — повод для заточения в тюрьме. Вот уж из таких-то бедолаг наш полк когда-то и сделали. Богом-Императором забытое и проклятое местечко, словом".

traits.locale_text: "Only from the stories of the old Call-Ups. People there are mere property. And minor mistakes are grounds for imprisonment. Our regiment was once built from such unfortunate souls. In short, it's a cursed place forgotten by the God-Emperor."

"Only from the stories of the old Call-Ups. People there are nothing but property. And minor mistakes are grounds for imprisonment. Our regiment was once formed from such unfortunate souls. In short, it's a cursed place abandoned by the God-Emperor."

"Merov? It's some rotten world in Calixis, where my ancestors came from. People there are owned by guilds. And minor mistakes are grounds for imprisonment. Our regiment was once formed out of poor souls like that. In short, it's a cursed place forgotten by the God-Emperor."

"Only from the stories of the old Call-Ups. People there are mere property. And minor mistakes are grounds for imprisonment. Our regiment was once built from such unfortunate souls. In short, it's a cursed place forgotten by the God-Emperor."

"Only from the stories of the old Call-Ups. People there are nothing but property. And minor mistakes are grounds for imprisonment. Our regiment was once formed from such unfortunate souls. In short, it's a cursed place abandoned by the God-Emperor."

"Only from the stories of the old Call-Ups. People there are nothing but property. And minor mistakes are grounds for imprisonment. Our regiment was once formed from such unfortunate souls. In short, it's a cursed place abandoned by the God-Emperor."

languages.text: 「メロウ？それはカリスの腐敗した世界で、私の祖先が来た場所だ。その世界の人々はギルドに支配されている。そして小さなミスは投獄の理由になる。私たちの連隊はかつて、そのような不幸な人々から成り立っていた。要するに、神皇帝に忘れられた呪われた場所だ」
languages.original_text: "Merov? It's some rotten world in Calixis, where my ancestors came from. People there are owned by guilds. And minor mistakes are grounds for imprisonment. Our regiment was once formed out of poor souls like that. In short, it's a cursed place forgotten by the God-Emperor."

languages.text: "Yalnızca eski Sevk Gruplarının hikâyelerinden. O insanlar maldan farksızmış. Küçük hatalar bile hapse atılma nedeniymiş. Alayımız bir zamanlar böyle talihsiz ruhlardan kurulmuş. Kısacası Tanrı İmparator'un terk ettiği lanetli bir yer."
languages.original_text: "Only from the stories of the old Call-Ups. People there are nothing but property. And minor mistakes are grounds for imprisonment. Our regiment was once formed from such unfortunate souls. In short, it's a cursed place abandoned by the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "Yalnızca eski Sevk Gruplarının hikâyelerinden. O insanlar maldan farksızmış. Küçük hatalar bile hapse atılma nedeniymiş. Alayımız bir zamanlar böyle talihsiz ruhlardan kurulmuş. Kısacası Tanrı İmparator'un terk ettiği lanetli bir yer."

languages.text: “我只从老一辈征召者的故事里听说过。那里的人说白了就是财产。稍微犯点小错，就会被关进监狱。我们军团最初就是由这些可怜人组成的。简言之，那是个被神皇遗忘的诅咒之地。”
languages.original_text: "Only from the stories of the old Call-Ups. People there are nothing but property. And minor mistakes are grounds for imprisonment. Our regiment was once formed from such unfortunate souls. In short, it's a cursed place abandoned by the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: “我只从老一辈征召者的故事里听说过。那里的人说白了就是财产。稍微犯点小错，就会被关进监狱。我们军团最初就是由这些可怜人组成的。简言之，那是个被神皇遗忘的诅咒之地。”

languages.text: "Nur aus den Geschichten der alten Einberufungen. Die Leute dort sind nichts weiter als Eigentum. Die sperren einen für das kleinste Vergehen ein. Unser Regiment wurde einst aus solchen armen Seelen gebildet. Kurz gesagt: Ein verfluchter, vom Gottimperator verlassener, Ort."
languages.original_text: "Only from the stories of the old Call-Ups. People there are nothing but property. And minor mistakes are grounds for imprisonment. Our regiment was once formed from such unfortunate souls. In short, it's a cursed place abandoned by the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "Nur aus den Geschichten der alten Einberufungen. Die Leute dort sind nichts weiter als Eigentum. Die sperren einen für das kleinste Vergehen ein. Unser Regiment wurde einst aus solchen armen Seelen gebildet. Kurz gesagt: Ein verfluchter, vom Gottimperator verlassener, Ort."

languages.text: « Tout ce que je sais, ça vient des histoires transmises par les Mobilisés précédents. Là-bas, les gens sont considérés comme des possessions et la moindre erreur est passible d'emprisonnement. À l'origine, notre régiment était formé de malheureux qui en ont fait les frais. En bref, c'est un lieu maudit que l'Empereur-Dieu a abandonné. »
languages.original_text: "Only from the stories of the old Call-Ups. People there are nothing but property. And minor mistakes are grounds for imprisonment. Our regiment was once formed from such unfortunate souls. In short, it's a cursed place abandoned by the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: « Tout ce que je sais, ça vient des histoires transmises par les Mobilisés précédents. Là-bas, les gens sont considérés comme des possessions et la moindre erreur est passible d'emprisonnement. À l'origine, notre régiment était formé de malheureux qui en ont fait les frais. En bref, c'est un lieu maudit que l'Empereur-Dieu a abandonné. »

languages.text: «Solo conozco las historias de los viejos llamados. Las personas allí son posesiones, y el error más mínimo es motivo para que a uno lo encierren. Nuestro regimiento empezó formado por desdichados como esos. En otras palabras, es un lugar maldito olvidado por el Dios Emperador».
languages.original_text: "Only from the stories of the old Call-Ups. People there are nothing but property. And minor mistakes are grounds for imprisonment. Our regiment was once formed from such unfortunate souls. In short, it's a cursed place abandoned by the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: «Solo conozco las historias de los viejos llamados. Las personas allí son posesiones, y el error más mínimo es motivo para que a uno lo encierren. Nuestro regimiento empezó formado por desdichados como esos. En otras palabras, es un lugar maldito olvidado por el Dios Emperador».
